notes:
The game says it is running but nothing appears. I got it to run by downgrading to Proton 8, but then the next day it failed to start again. I then started after I mounted a hard drive that doesn't have anything to do with Steam. Not sure if it's just random or if the game actually needs to be able to access all connected devices.

The game sometimes goes wrong if you have alt-tabbed. If you lose the ability to interact with it via the mouse, use Alt+Enter twice to swap between windowed and fullscreen. This fixes it.

If you lose the ability to access the menu with Esc, it can be accessed in the inventory in the top right.
